style_effects: A flickering translucent purple aura pulses gently around Dragonite's form, casting shifting shadows that elongate and twist unnaturally in the air. Slow drifting mist particles swirl in a cold, eerie blue-white glow, while faint energy pulses of deep violet radiate through its ethereal skin. The lighting mood is an unsettling, pale moonlight blue with faint purple undertones, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
